# Explosive Ampoule

## Observed Text

- Deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- AoE potion for multi-enemy hallway or elite fights; compare against direct boss-defense potions when Vantom's Dismember is the visible Act 1 check.
- Strong into Entomancer because it deals damage without triggering Personal Hive Dazed generation.
